title: Inventory Restore
description: Lets players restore their inventory when they die.
body:
# InvRestore 🚀🔒

A secure, lightweight Bukkit/Spigot plugin for saving, viewing, and restoring player inventories—now with strong encryption and tamper protection.

## Features ✨
- **Automatic Inventory Save on Death** ⚰️
- **Manual Inventory Snapshots** 💾
- **Easy GUI Inventory Viewer** 🖼️
- **Strong AES Encryption & HMAC Integrity Prevents Admin Abuse with Tampering Saved Inventories** 🔐

## Commands 🛠️
- **`/invsave`** \[player\] — Save your own or another player’s inventory.
- **`/restore death|save`** \[player\] — Restore a death or manual save inventory.
- **`/invview death|save`** \[player\] — View saved or death inventories in a GUI.

## Permissions 🔑
- **`invrestore.save`** — Use `/invsave`.
- **`invrestore.restore`** — Use `/restore`.
- **`invrestore.view`** — View other players' inventories.

## Installation & Setup 📦
1. Place the plugin `.jar` in your server’s `plugins` folder.
2. Restart your server.
3. Edit `inventories.yml` if you want to customize storage.
4. Assign permissions as needed.

## Security Notice 🛡️
All inventory data is encrypted and authenticated per-player, ensuring privacy and integrity.

## Support & Contributing 🤝
- **Issues**: Report bugs or request features on GitHub.
- **Pull Requests**: Contributions are welcome! Fork and submit a PR.

Restore with confidence! 🎉
